description: smoke-test a Dynamo frontend: /v1/models + one chat completion (read-only)
rules: read-only: only HTTP GET /v1/models and one POST /v1/chat/completions
only http/https base URLs are accepted (file:// and other schemes rejected)
polls /v1/models with retries; result JSON written to record_store
usage: Set BASE_URL (the Dynamo frontend, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8000) and optional RETRIES. Output: router_health.json.
limitation: Smoke test only, not a benchmark (one chat completion). KV-aware mode without worker KV-event publication degrades to approximate mode — this perk flags but does not fix worker config. Cross-mode latency claims need a separate benchmark run.
